name: KOA evidence-unit database
description: Current local evidence-unit catalog linking evidence levels to clinical intervention domains.

name: Level 3: Randomized or high-level intervention study
description: Intervention-level evidence with direct treatment relevance.

name: Level 5: Observational study
description: Phenotype, risk factor, or real-world association evidence.

name: Level 6: Narrative review / commentary / background
description: Contextual support; not used as primary decision evidence.

name: Level 7: Protocol
description: Planned research; useful for landscape tracking, not effect estimation.

name: Exercise rehabilitation
description: Exercise rehabilitation domain. Total evidence-unit links: 1844.

name: Surgery or escalation
description: Surgery or escalation domain. Total evidence-unit links: 1419.

name: Nutrition and weight management
description: Nutrition and weight management domain. Total evidence-unit links: 430.

name: Psychology, behavior and self-management
description: Psychology, behavior and self-management domain. Total evidence-unit links: 781.

name: Pharmacologic or injection therapy
description: Pharmacologic or injection therapy domain. Total evidence-unit links: 203.

name: Assistive support
description: Assistive support domain. Total evidence-unit links: 66.
